## Proposed source

Name the source and link to its official site.

## Why it belongs here

Explain the user value and what category it fits into.

- [ ] RSS or Atom feed
- [ ] Public export
- [ ] HTML scraping

## Source permissions and notes

List anything important about rate limits, terms, robots.txt, or licensing.
